notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist or was moved.

cookieConsent.title: Storage & cookies
cookieConsent.intro: API Arena uses first-party browser storage that is strictly necessary to run the service (login session, in-progress challenge timer). We use no third-party tracking, advertising or analytics. Optional storage saves your preferences (theme, tutorials, language). See our
cookieConsent.necessaryDesc: Login session, challenge timer, tab control. Always on.
cookieConsent.preferencesDesc: Remembers your theme, tutorials and language choice.
cookieConsent.analyticsDesc: Anonymous product usage to improve the platform (currently not active).

login.title: Sign in
login.description: You need to sign in to start this challenge. If you do not have an account yet, you can register.

loginChallenge.title: Sign in to compete
loginChallenge.description: You need to sign in to start this challenge and submit your solution. If you do not have an account yet, you can register in a moment.

attemptBlock.dailyCopy: You have used all allowed submissions for this challenge today (UTC). You can start a new run after the reset time below.
attemptBlock.cooldownCopy: You must wait before starting another run for this challenge. Time remaining until your next attempt is allowed:
